prompt: Photoreal high-end 3D animated feature film, cinematic anamorphic look. FIGHTER A, the Sponge Fighter: a bright-yellow rectangular kitchen-sponge creature with porous sponge texture and holes along his sides, big round blue eyes, two big front buck teeth, skinny noodle arms and legs, wearing a small flowing RED CAPE, aviator goggles, white karate sparring gloves, plain blue shorts and black shoes. His face is set in fierce determined concentration. His powers: lightning-fast karate, blowing giant glistening soap bubbles, and sponge resilience where impacts squash him flat like an accordion and he springs back unharmed. FIGHTER B, the Green Gladiator: a colossal green-skinned muscle giant, heavy scowling brow, shaggy dark hair, a bronze spiked pauldron strapped on his left shoulder, leather bracers on both forearms, bold white tribal war paint striped across his chest and face, ragged dark-gray shorts, barefoot, three times taller than the sponge. He wields a massive two-handed STONE WAR HAMMER. His powers: earth-shattering strength, a two-handed thunderclap that fires a visible ring-shaped shockwave, skyscraper leaps into ground-pound impacts, and a rage mode where his war paint glows green and his muscles swell. SETTING: an ancient stone ruins arena on a mountain plateau at storm dusk, heavy rain, rain-slicked flagstones with puddles reflecting lightning, mist rolling between broken pillars, warm fire glow in the distance. STYLE: teal-and-orange cinematic grade, cool blue storm shadows with warm amber rim light, volumetric rain and mist, film grain, shallow depth of field on close-ups. Intense but clean PG action: absolutely no blood, no gore, no injuries shown; impacts read as water spray, mist bursts, shockwaves and sparks. No text, no HUD, no interface graphics anywhere. No dialogue; thunder, rain and deep cinematic impacts in the audio. SCENE 1 of 5 (15 seconds), shot list: 0-2s HOOK: extreme close-up of aviator goggles perched on the sponge's forehead, raindrops crawling across the lenses, a fork of lightning reflected in the glass. 2-5s: pull back to reveal the Sponge Fighter standing in the rain, red cape rippling in the storm wind; across the arena, out of the mist, the Green Gladiator steps forward, each footfall shaking puddles, dragging the huge stone war hammer so it grinds a trench through the wet flagstones with sparks. 5-10s: slow circling: tracking shot as the two fighters circle each other, low angle through the rain; close-up of the gladiator's war-painted face tightening; close-up of the sponge's gloves curling into fists; thunder rolls. 10-15s: the gladiator plants his feet and hefts the stone hammer high overhead with both hands, roaring at the sky as lightning flashes behind him; the sponge drops into a low karate guard, cape settling. FINAL FRAME, HOLD LAST 1.5 SECONDS: wide two-shot in the rain, the Green Gladiator on the right with the hammer raised fully overhead, the Sponge Fighter on the left in a low karate guard, lightning silhouetting them.
